text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to see and understand visual information from the world. Two important tasks in computer vision are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition identifies what an image shows, like a cat or a tree. Object detection goes further—it finds and locates specific objects within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, they are used in photo organization, medical imaging, and security systems. One of the most exciting applications is in self-driving cars. These vehicles use computer vision to recognize roads, traffic signs, pedestrians, and other cars, allowing them to navigate safely without human help.
